name: Daily Movement Builder
description: Build sustainable exercise habits with this flexible 30-day program that adapts to your fitness level and schedule, focusing on consistency over intensity for long-term health benefits.

steps.title: Movement Assessment
steps.description: Evaluate your current activity level and set realistic goals
steps.content: Track your daily steps and identify opportunities for more movement

steps.title: Finding Your Rhythm
steps.description: Discover the best times and types of movement for your lifestyle
steps.content: Experiment with different activities and timing to find what works best
